title: danthonia urvillei
intro: Danthonia urvillei, also known as the Urvilla Grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand and Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The Urvilla Grass has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Danthonia urvillei is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
